scripts.db:recent: wrangler d1 execute visits --remote --command "SELECT datetime(ts/1000,'unixepoch') as time, route, country, device, is_rsc FROM visits ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 50;"
scripts.db:top: wrangler d1 execute visits --remote --command "SELECT route, COUNT(*) c FROM visits WHERE ts > (strftime('%s','now')-86400)*1000 GROUP BY route ORDER BY c DESC LIMIT 20;"
